📋 My Orders

Our Story

More than just food, it's a legacy.

← Back to Home

The Beginning

Dosa House wasn't built in a day. It started with a simple vision: to bring the authentic, home-cooked flavors of South Indian grandmother's kitchens to the streets of Bhimavaram. We realized that in the rush of modern life, the art of slow-fermented batter and hand-pounded spices was fading away.

So, we decided to go back to the roots. No shortcuts, no preservatives—just pure ingredients and patience.

Our Values

🌾

Tradition

We use traditional stone grinders for our batter to ensure the texture remains airy and light.

🥥

Freshness

Our chutneys are ground fresh every few hours. We don't believe in "storing for later".

❤️

Love

Every dosa is made with the same care we would use for our own family.

Get in Touch

We love hearing from our hungry customers!
